name: Cabbage Roll Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp in a large saucepan.
2. Add beef and onions. Cook over medium heat until meat is no longer pink.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Stir in uncooked rice, mixing well.
5. Grease a 13-inch x 9-inch pan or casserole dish lightly.
6. Spread the meat mixture evenly in the dish.
7. Cover evenly with shredded cabbage.
8. Mix together remaining ingredients: water, tomato sauce, and milk.
9. Pour all but 1 cup of this mixture evenly over the cabbage.
10. Cover with foil and bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
11. Remove from oven and pour reserved liquid over cabbage.
12. Cover loosely and bake for 1 more hour or until cabbage is very tender.
13. Cool to room temperature, then wrap and refrigerate or freeze.
14. Best if made the day before it is served. Makes 8 servings.
